name: shopping-assistant-mobile
description: Wrapper Android (Capacitor) de Shopping Assistant — UI embarquée, backend sur le PC en LAN.

scripts.build:web: cd ../shopping-assistant/apps/web && cross-env BUILD_MOBILE=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL= next build
scripts.sync: npm run build:web && cap sync android
scripts.apk: npm run sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
